name: flashseal
description: Encrypted burn-after-open text and image sharing tool on Cloudflare Pages + KV

scripts.build: echo "FlashSeal uses static assets in public/"
scripts.dev: wrangler pages dev public --kv SECRETS --port 8788 --ip 127.0.0.1 --inspector-port 9230 --persist-to ./.wrangler/state --log-level warn
